auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
economic_notes: Magnus James Enterprises LP and Magnus James Enterprises Inc. are government business enterprises. Capital planning study project committed for $300,000 funded by ISC. COVID-19 continued to impact program delivery.
notes: Audit was qualified due to inability to observe physical inventory counts at March 31, 2022 and March 31, 2021. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants' located in Kenora, Ontario. Two GBEs: Magnus James Enterprises LP and Magnus James Enterprises Inc. accounted for on modified equity basis. Restricted cash at CIBC ($746,990) designated for OFNLP programming. Short-term GIC investment also designated for OFNLP programming. Contributions repayable of $1,248,569 included in accounts payable. Subsequent event: one council member resigned effective September 30, 2022. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers (1,612,675 - 1,001,060 = 611,615), which includes other grants, other revenues, and GBE income.
